achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage I
achievements.description: Complete Warakiya without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 1-01 - BLK 1-04)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage II
achievements.description: Complete fist half of Clock Tower without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 2-01 - BLK 2-03)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage III
achievements.description: Complete 1st part of Evil Forest without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 3-01 - BLK 3-02)(Clock Tower route required. 1st loop only.)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage IV
achievements.description: Complete 2nd part of Evil Forest without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 3-03 - BLK 3-04)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage V
achievements.description: Complete Haunted Ship of Fools without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 4-0A - BLK 4-0E)( Medusa midboss points are OK)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage VI
achievements.description: Complete MMoMM without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 4-01 - BLK 4-03)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: [*]No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage VII
achievements.description: Complete Cave of the Lost Dracula's Son without gaining points damagless (1st loop, BLK 5-01 - BLK 5-05)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: No Monsters Were Harmed During Walkthrough of this Stage VIII
achievements.description: Complete Sunken City without gaining points deathless (1st loop, BLK 6-01 - BLK 6-05) (Don't kill Bone Dragons)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Pile of Bones
achievements.description: Defeat Skull Knight at block 1-04 with unupgraded Vampire Killer as Ralph damagless (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: If It Bleeds, We Can Kill It.
achievements.description: Kill the ball enemy that spins on floors.
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: One-Eyed Lightning Conductor
achievements.description: Defeat Cyclop as Grant using only lightning trick without breaking blocks.
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Bat Company
achievements.description: Defeat Vampire Bat on BLK 4-03 with Vampire Killer as Ralph damageless (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Monster from the Deep
achievements.description: Defeat Water Dragon with Vampire Killer as Ralph damageless (No Hearts Usage)(Not recieve any damage after 1st encounter)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Exorcist
achievements.description: Defeat all three bosses at the end of Stage 7 (either path) as Ralph damageless (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Death by the Whip
achievements.description: Defeat Grim Reaper with unupgraded Vampire Killer as Ralph (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: My Greatest Enemy is Myself
achievements.description: Defeat Doppleganger with Vampire Killer as Ralph damageless (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Out of Mana
achievements.description: Defeat Dracula as Sypha (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Belmont's Destiny
achievements.description: Defeat Dracula with Vampire Killer as Ralph damageless (No Hearts Usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Castle Fall
achievements.description: Finish first loop from start of the game in one session
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: All Spirits are Asleep
achievements.description: Finish first loop from start of the game in one session without using continue
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: The Long Fight is Over
achievements.description: Finish 2nd loop starting from 1st stage in one session
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Grantslevania
achievements.description: Finish the game  starting from the 1st stage, using only Grant after accepting him as a partner.
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Path of Wizardry
achievements.description: Finish the game  starting from the 1st stage, using only Sypha after accepting her as a partner.
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: In the Name of My Mother
achievements.description: Finish the game starting from the 1st stage, using only Alucard after accepting him as a partner.

achievements.title: Proof of Blood
achievements.description: Finish first loop using only Ralph without dying
achievements.author: Shmelyoff
